title: SERV Act
stage_label: Received in the Senate and Read twice and referred to the Committee on Small Business and Entrepreneurship.
crs_summary: Successful Entrepreneurship for Reservists and Veterans Act or the SERV Act This bill requires (1) the Small Business Administration to report on the veterans interagency task force; and (2) the Government Accountability Office to report on access to credit for small businesses owned and controlled by veterans, Reservists, or their spouses.
last_action_text: Received in the Senate and Read twice and referred to the Committee on Small Business and Entrepreneurship.
